[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / acos

# Method: acos()

```ts
acos(value): number;
```

Calculate the arc cosine of a value.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Value in the range -1 to 1. |

## Returns

`number`

Angle in radians.
